snippet: The trend toward hybrid search in RAG (dense + sparse retrieval) is clear. BM25 is back, combined with vector search. Every major RAG framework now supports this pattern.
author: ben@mastodon.social

snippet: RAG evals are the new hotness. RAGAS, TruLens, DeepEval — the trend toward rigorous RAG evaluation is growing. Quality measurement is finally getting attention.
author: cara@mastodon.social
